trans-unit.source: Steam version of the game is not supported by this installer. You need to install the DLC through Steam.
trans-unit.target: 이 설치기는 스팀 버전을 지원하지 않습니다. 스팀을 통해 DLC를 설치하십시오.

context-group.context: Id: no_steam Error message shown when DLC installer detects that the user is trying to apply it to Steam version of the game.

trans-unit.source: Unable to detect the folder containing {#BASE_PRODUCT_NAME}. Please select it.

context-group.context: Id: app_path_not_found Error message shown when DLC installer is unable to automatically locate folder containing the game.

trans-unit.source: The specified folder does not contain {#BASE_PRODUCT_NAME}. You need to select the folder containing the game.
trans-unit.target: 지정된 폴더 안에 {#BASE_PRODUCT_NAME}가 포함되어 있지 않습니다. 게임이 들어있는 폴더를 선택하십시오.

context-group.context: Id: not_found Error message shown by DLC installer when the user selects folder which does not contain the game.

trans-unit.source: The specified folder does not exist. You need to select the folder containing {#BASE_PRODUCT_NAME}.
trans-unit.target: 지정한 폴더가 존재하지 않습니다 당신은 {#BASE_PRODUCT_NAME} (이)가 들어있는 폴더를 선택해야합니다

context-group.context: Id: not_dir Error message shown by DLC installer when the selected folder does not exist.

trans-unit.note: Mellor "cartafol": "O cartafol especificado non existe. Tes que indicar o cartafol que conteña {#BASE_PRODUCT_NAME}."
